jsonld.name: Intent Fog
jsonld.description: The probabilistic uncertainty that arises when contextual signals suggest potentially harmful intent but cannot confirm it—a state of having to act on incomplete, inferential reads of motive while knowing that both over-trust and under-trust carry real moral costs.
